report.summary: Cycle 11 standup (Mar 28 late night). BTC ~$66K flat, ETH ~$1,985 sub-$2K, F&G 12-13 (50-day ALL-TIME streak). DELTA: Uncommitted files 367→378 (+11). build-8 shipped stablecoin-yield-tracker tool + tariffs-trade-war guide. design fixed UX on 3 pages + created 3 OG SVGs. publish-v6 promoted yield-tokenization + token-security-scanner. community-v2 drafted 5 tweets (#232-236) + newsletter v39 + 50-day-fear SVG card. eod-v10 confirmed 0 regressions. Deploy blocked 21st consecutive cycle. 53 total agent runs today.

sections.title: Analytics
items: BTC: ~$66,008 (flat from v10, holding $66K support). Down ~24.6% YTD, ~48% from Oct 2025 ATH ($126K). Iran geopolitical tensions + oil >$100 suppressing risk assets. Whale accumulation ongoing — 270K BTC, exchange reserves at 7-year low (2.21M BTC).
ETH: ~$1,985 (sub-$2K for consecutive cycles, -4% daily). Down ~60% from Aug 2025 high ($4,953). ETH/BTC ratio ~0.030. SOL at $82.95.

F&G INDEX: 12-13 (Extreme Fear). ~50-day streak = ALL-TIME RECORD (surpassing post-FTX 38d, crypto winter 42d). $8.7B quarterly options expired today. Morgan Stanley ETF announced at 0.14% fee (cheapest yet).

DELTA FROM v10: BTC flat. ETH flat. F&G stable 12-13. Uncommitted files 367→378 (+11). build-8 shipped 2 new pages (stablecoin-yield-tracker tool + tariffs-trade-war guide, ~3,400 words + interactive React component). design fixed UX on 3 pages (mobile responsiveness, a11y, heading hierarchy) + created 3 OG SVGs. publish-v6 promoted 2 pages to PUBLISHED_PAGES. community-v2 drafted 5 tweets + newsletter v39 + SVG social card for 50-day fear record. eod-v10 confirmed 0 regressions, 146 TS errors (+1 non-blocking). No new commits. No deploys.

sections.title: Project Manager
items: CYCLE 11 OF MARCH 28. Ten full rotations (all 6 agents) completed + this standup = 53 total agent runs today. Breakdown: standup×11, build×8, publish×6, design×9, community×9, eod×10.

WHAT SHIPPED SINCE v10: build-8 created Stablecoin Yield Tracker (interactive tool with 15 protocols, search/filter/sort, risk-colored cards) and Tariffs & Trade Wars Crypto Impact Guide (~3,400 words, 8 sections, 3 scenarios, 7 strategies). design fixed duplicate h1, non-semantic dropdown, missing prefers-reduced-motion in Token Security Scanner; fixed 4 mobile grid breakpoints in Stablecoin Yield Tracker; created 3 OG SVGs (token-security-scanner, yield-tokenization, stablecoin-yield-tracker). publish-v6 promoted yield-tokenization + token-security-scanner to PUBLISHED_PAGES. community-v2 drafted tweets #232-236 (50-day fear record, Token Security Scanner launch, Yield Tokenization thread, $8.7B options aftermath, Bear Market thread) + newsletter v39 weekly digest + 50-day-fear SVG social card. eod-v10 confirmed 0 regressions.

CARRY-OVER BLOCKERS (CRITICAL): (1) Deploy — 378 uncommitted files (+11 from v10), 21st cycle flagging P0. HEAD still at 21aaf5b (Mar 25). (2) 2 PUBLISH_QUEUE items blocked (wallet-security slug mismatch + restaking no page.tsx). (3) Stablecoin Yield Tracker needs server/client split for proper metadata export (logged for future sprint). (4) ~105 legacy published slugs missing page.tsx (~82% coverage). (5) 146 TS errors in 6 files (+1, non-blocking). (6) 17 duplicate slugs in PUBLISHED_PAGES need cleanup.
GIT STATUS: HEAD at 21aaf5b (unchanged since Mar 25). 378 files pending. All changes additive.

PUBLISHED PAGES: 598 slugs in config (+2 from v10). PUBLISH_QUEUE: 2 items remaining (both blocked). Content velocity today: 22+ pages built across 8 build cycles. 236 tweets drafted. 39 newsletter versions. 28+ OG images. 53+ SVG social cards.

sections.title: CEO — Next Cycle Priorities
items: PRIORITY 1 — DEPLOY [CRITICAL, 21ST CONSECUTIVE CYCLE]: 378 uncommitted files spanning 3+ days. 22+ pages, 28+ OG images, interactive tools (Token Security Scanner, Stablecoin Yield Tracker), UX fixes, and every piece of content built today invisible to production. Google cannot index any of it. Time-sensitive narratives (50-day F&G record, $8.7B options expiry, Morgan Stanley ETF) aging out. Jefe: rm .git/index.lock && git add -A && git commit && git push. 5-minute action, highest possible leverage.

PRIORITY 2 — FIX 2 BLOCKED QUEUE ITEMS: crypto-wallet-security-token-approvals-guide has a slug mismatch (found as crypto-wallet-security-guide-2026). restaking-comparison has no page.tsx. Both fixable in one build cycle. This empties the PUBLISH_QUEUE completely.

PRIORITY 3 — CAPITALIZE ON BEAR MARKET CONTENT MOAT: With 598 published pages, 22+ new this cycle, and perfectly-timed content (Fear streak, tariffs guide, stablecoin yields, token security), degen0x has a massive content advantage vs competitors — IF deployed. Every hour of delay is lost indexing time. Post-deploy, community tweets #232-236 and newsletter v39 are loaded and ready to fire.
